domain: Hadzabe click language (Tanzania Lake Eyasi; language isolate; click consonants + ejective + prenasalized phonemes; clicks serve as discourse/back-channel/emphasis rare-symbol markers)
specific_mechanism: Per-token logit-bias scheme for special rare-marker tokens with explicit emission gate: define a catalog T_rare = {[CLICK_FEEDBACK], [STOP_EMIT], [CERTAINTY], [REFUSAL]}; during decoding, logit-bias(t) = -∞ for t ∈ T_rare in normal positions; at each step a learned attention-gated emission predictor G(h_t) ∈ [0,1] determines whether the current position is 'sanctioned' for marker emission; if G(h_t) > τ, the bias is removed for T_rare allowing emission.
llm_application: HADZA-CLICK-ATTEN: per-token logit-suppression + emission-gate for rare special-marker tokens. Architecture: (1) define T_rare catalog of discourse-feedback markers (certainty, refusal, stop-emit, backchannel); (2) at every decoding step, logit_bias(t∈T_rare) = -inf by default — full attenuation of rare markers in normal body; (3) emission gate G(h_t) = sigmoid(W_gate · h_t) over current hidden state; (4) if G(h_t) > τ_emit, the -inf bias is lifted (release attenuation) — sanctioning marker emission at that position; (5) optionally learn G via contrastive FT on dialogue corpora with explicit marker positions. Differs from Backchannel/Filler 2509.20237 (post-hoc FT representation of fillers but no logit-suppression + emission gate), Aligning Backchannel OpenReview (joint embedding space, not logit-bias mechanism), SIGDIAL Discourse Markers (evaluation, not generation), Token Reduction (pruning, not feedback-attenuation with emission gate). Differs from R417 VEPS-DECRESCENDO (paraphrase-cycle confidence decay) by EXPLICIT MARKER-CATALOG + emission gate.
novelty_claim: Backchannel/filler FT + Aligning Backchannel + SIGDIAL Discourse + Token Reduction cover discourse-marker / rare-token space. HADZA-CLICK-ATTEN adds (a) rare-marker catalog T_rare + (b) per-step emission-gate G(h_t) + (c) -inf logit suppression release on G(h_t) > τ. Recombination of logit-bias + per-step emission gating.
content_words: rare special-marker token logit suppression body

llm_side: rare special-marker token logit suppression body
